query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `processo_documentos` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`companyId` int NOT NULL,
	`processoId` int NOT NULL,
	`nome` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`tipo` enum('peticao_inicial','contestacao','sentenca','recurso','acordo','pericia','audiencia','despacho','mandado','outros') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'outros',
	`descricao` text,
	`fileKey` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
	`mimeType` varchar(100),
	`tamanhoBytes` int,
	`criadoPor` varchar(255),
	`criadoPorUserId` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`deletedAt` timestamp NULL,
	INDEX `pd_company` (`companyId`),
	INDEX `pd_processo` (`processoId`)
);

	`fileKey` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,

	`tamanhoBytes` int,
	`criadoPor` varchar(255),
	`criadoPorUserId` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`deletedAt` timestamp NULL,
	INDEX `pd_company` (`companyId`),
	INDEX `pd_processo` (`processoId`)
);
